description: Top passenger-car brands by count, registered Personbil only. Use when user asks most common car makes. All-vehicle ranking: dmr-top-brands.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" | STATS car_count = COUNT(*) BY brand = KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBetegnelseStruktur.KoeretoejMaerkeTypeNavn.keyword | SORT car_count DESC | LIMIT 20
